procedure_name: Induction Chemotherapy for Acute Myeloid Leukemia
source_files: PMJAY_STG_Acute Myeloid Leukemia & Acute Promyelocytic Leukemia.pdf
min_doctor_qualification: DM (Medical oncology) or equivalent (MD Medicine with experience/Fellowship in Hematology/Medical Oncology)
clinical_indications: Age >60 years; Good performance status with no co-morbidities
In patients who are not in remission after first course of induction - second course (reinduction) can be given with 2+5 regimen

clinical_thresholds.note: with good performance status and no co-morbidities
after first course of induction for reinduction with 2+5 regimen

preauth.label: Peripheral blood or bone marrow flow cytometry confirming AML diagnosis
Cytogenetics/FISH/RTPCR on bone marrow or peripheral blood
Clinical notes (Age, Performance status, comorbidities, extramedullary disease sites if any, infections)
Clinical notes stating date of start of induction therapy (for reinduction)
Peripheral blood or bone marrow showing persistent disease (second BM/PB - after day 21 of first BM test or after day 21 of induction chemotherapy date) (for reinduction)
Prior treatment with chemotherapy (if second time): regimen, dates, response (if applicable)

claim.label: Reports of tests supporting diagnosis (pathology, radiology, microbiology, hematology, biochemistry, etc.)
Discharge summary of day care department
Periodic CBC reports (once a week minimum during induction)
All documents as mentioned in preauthorization

ppd_preauth.q: Poor performance status (3/4) for AML induction?
Low ejection fraction on ECHO (less than 50%) for AML induction?

cpd_claim.q: Same package re-claimed within 6 months (excluding reinduction for non-remission) for AML induction?
Periodic CBC reports available for induction period?

common_queries: Diagnosis of AML not confirmed by flow cytometry or cytogenetics/FISH/RTPCR reports.
Echocardiography report showing low ejection fraction (<50%) for AML induction without justification.
Clinical notes missing details on age, performance status, or comorbidities for AML induction.
For reinduction, date of prior induction therapy or evidence of persistent disease after day 21 is missing.
Barcode of administered drugs or diagnosis supporting reports missing at claim stage.
Package re-claimed within 6 months without justification for non-remission after induction.

additional_information.special_empanelment: Qualified Medical Oncologist/hematologist; Chemotherapy unit (Day care and Ward)
clinical_key_pointers: 3+7 induction (Cytarabine 100 mg/m² 7 Days, Daunomycin 60 mg/m² x 3 Days ) – First line therapy
Can be given as second course (2+5 i.e. Cytarabine 100 mg/m² 5 Days, Daunomycin 60 mg/m² x 2 Days) if not in remission after first course
additional_information.fitness_criteria: Age <60 years OR Age >60 years with Good performance status with no co-morbidities
contraindications: Age > 65 years with multiple co-morbidities, poor general condition, high risk disease (AML only)
